item_id.description: Stable identifier for the unit of work. Must be unique within items.jsonl for a run.

ordinal.description: Optional stable ordering key. If present, the runner must treat it as the canonical order.

item_unit.description: Optional semantic label for this unit (e.g., 'paragraph', 'record', 'doc').

ref.description: Pointer to upstream origin (file path, URL, db key, etc.).

offset.description: Optional offset/position in the source (e.g., line number, byte offset).

source.description: Optional provenance for where the item came from.

payload.description: Opaque item content. Semantics are stage-defined; the runner treats it as structured data.

labels.description: Optional lightweight tags/metadata for filtering, debugging, or reporting.

schema_version.description: Contract version string for this row schema.
